title: Taiji - VCU Repo download and Build commands

content.text: This page is to summarize how to download code and build
For access related refer this page - Source code download for Taiji platform - GEN4 generic - Docupedia

content.title: Repo Init command
content.content: repo init -u cm_gerrit:projects/taiji/manifests -b rb-taiji_main_dev  -m rb-taiji-hqx121c1-pcs04.xml -g autosar --no-repo-verify --depth=5 repo sync -c -q --force-sync

content.text: To Build: Build.bat -p t1j -o app -tc TC37X/TC38X/TC39X
To clean: Build.bat -p t1j -o app -tc TC37X/TC38X/TC39X
To debug : Build.bat -p t1j -o app -tc TC37X/TC38X/TC39X -d
